summary: Frontend-only testing of NEW mobile-first conversion redesign for city transfer pages. Tested CDG, Nice, Beauvais, Paris Train Station pages with mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800) viewports. All 16 features tested successfully.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile-first conversion redesign features tested successfully. Key testids working: city-transfer-page, city-hero-title, booking-form-card, booking-form, submit-booking-btn, vehicle-card-1-4, book-vehicle-1-4, selected-vehicle-banner, mobile-sticky-cta, trust-badge-top, view-all-cities-btn. Language switcher accessible via globe icon button with bg-gray-700 class in header. CityTransferPage component reused across CDG, Orly, Beauvais, ParisTrainStation, Nice, and all other city pages.
